eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 10:22 AM on JUN 13, 2026 Effective until 6:22 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A SAFE Alert has been issued for Sierra Vista Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Sierra Vista Police Department is looking for Kim Broughton, last seen driving a 2013 Silver Honda CRV with Arizona plate 212LDM.

If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
